privileged_info_summary: This task creates two FTP-only user accounts in the synthetic 'acmecorp.test' virtual server. User 'alice_dev' (Alice Chen) and user 'dave_uploads' (Dave Martinez) are assigned to /home/acmecorp/public_html and /home/acmecorp/public_html/uploads respectively, with non-interactive shells (/bin/false or /usr/sbin/nologin), FTP access enabled, and email access disabled. All metadata values are internally consistent, match the task description and README specifications, and align with what the verifier.py validation script checks for.
